guard_snippet: if alias not in MODULE_PATHS: raise KeyError(...) before indexing
potential_consequence: Unhandled KeyError if typo in registry alias

trigger_condition: Metric func_name absent in resolved module
guard_snippet: if not hasattr(mod, func_name): raise AttributeError(...)

potential_consequence: ImportError or OSError swallowed or uncaught

trigger_condition: _get_returns returns None passed to drawdown module
guard_snippet: if returns is None: return np.nan
if not np.isfinite(alpha_val) or not np.isfinite(benchmark_annual): return np.nan

trigger_condition: path is empty string or invalid

guard_snippet: if not metrics: raise ValueError('metrics cannot be empty')

trigger_condition: len(ret) < window, rolling returns all NaN
potential_consequence: Empty Series, downstream may assume non-empty

trigger_condition: All returns positive, downside std zero
potential_consequence: inf in Sortino from division by zero

trigger_condition: peak or valley not in df_cum index

if max_dd_date not in rolling_max.index: return np.nan
